caption: A group of performers dressed in traditional martial arts attire are practicing their skills on a stage in front of an audience. The performers, wearing blue and yellow outfits, are seen holding long wooden staffs and performing various martial arts moves. They move around the stage with grace and precision, demonstrating their expertise in handling the staffs. The audience watches attentively as the performers showcase their skills, creating an atmosphere of excitement and admiration. The performers' movements are fluid and synchronized, highlighting their training and dedication to the art of martial arts.
